f1.title: Keep track of cash cows and hot leads on your customer map
f1.desc: As a sales rep, is it a challenge to get an accurate overview of your territory? And to know where to focus your energy? S-Locator is the best sales route planner software for you to:
f1.b1: Identify current opportunities by using color-coded maps and filters (like ABC categories)
f1.b2: Visually differentiate accounts with eye-catching symbols
f1.b3: Know which areas you will concentrate on with the Priority Map

f2.title: (Re)schedule any time and achieve up to 25% more customer visits
f2.desc: Outside sales are dynamic - it stands to reason that a dynamic sales route planner app is the tool you need to get a leg up. S-Locator brings order to the chaos of inevitable rescheduling of stops.
f2.b1: Appointment cancelled? Generate an updated schedule in seconds to accommodate your current circumstances
f2.b2: Update your schedule whenever necessary to ensure maximum efficiency
f2.b3: A visit's urgency, specific business hours, and a host of other factors can all be taken into account

f3.title: Visit accounts at the right moment to close the deal
f3.desc: Do you find prioritizing your customers tricky? Are you tired of constantly having to put out fires? The S-Locator sales route planner app will ensure you get a grip on all the moving parts in your territory.
f3.b1: Be free of worry and stress over when to plan the next visit - let S-Locator keep track and act on your behalf
f3.b2: Accounts due for a visit automatically appear in your schedule
f3.b3: Adapt clients' intervals at any time so you can follow up at the right moment

cta.title: Increase your customer visits by up to
cta.rest: with S-Locator - your sales route planner app

q1.q: How much do I save with S-Locator? How soon does it pay off?
q1.a: You currently spend an average of 50€ per customer visit, all expenses considered. With S-Locator, one additional visit per day is possible, meaning 20 additional visits per month. This generates added value equivalent to 1000€ per field rep and per month.

q2.q: Will S-Locator record the routes I drive?
q2.a: No; S-Locator does not store GPS records of drives. It is a great help for field reps, not a surveillance tool.

q3.q: Can I use S-Locator with Salesforce, Dynamics CRM or other CRM/ERP systems?
q3.a: Yes, S-Locator works with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, and other CRM/ERP systems.

q4.q: Can I integrate the S-Locator route planning algorithm into my own field rep app?
q4.a: Yes, you can! Check out our RESTful JSON S-Locator ISV API.

q5.q: Somebody calls and wants to have an appointment – how does S-Locator react?
q5.a: You can enter the appointment directly. S-Locator detects conflicts and optimizes your itinerary to reflect the revised schedule.

q6.q: Can S-Locator help me avoid traffic jams?
q6.a: Yes, if desired, S-Locator takes the current traffic situation into account when planning the route.

q7.q: Does the S-Locator route planner help me win new leads?
q7.a: Yes. Import your prospects into the CRM and S-Locator calculates optimized route plans for you to reach new businesses.

q8.q: Is there an offline version of S-Locator?
q8.a: S-Locator is an online-web-application with support for offline data storage. In situations without internet connection, your most important data is readily available offline in your browser.

q9.q: For which industries is route planning suitable?
q9.a: S-Locator is suitable for any size of business: From a one-person company to large corporations with 1,000+ field staff across various industries.

q10.q: How do I get help and support for S-Locator?
q10.a: You get access to tutorial videos and PDF manuals. Within the application you will find online help. Additionally, our support team is happy to help you via email.

q11.q: Which use cases is S-Locator suitable for?
q11.a: S-Locator is used for route planning in field sales with regular client calls, one-time visits, mystery shopping, new customer acquisition, recurring service activities.

q12.q: I'd like to get a demonstration of S-Locator.
q12.a: We are happy to prepare an online presentation for your management, sales management, IT management and key sales representatives.

q13.q: Can I try S-Locator without obligation or cost?
q13.a: Yes. Register for a free trial. The trial license ends automatically after 30 days and there are no costs.

q14.q: Is S-Locator for centralized or decentralized route planning?
q14.a: S-Locator can be used for centralized, decentralized and combined planning.

q15.q: Can I use S-Locator for districting or geo-marketing?
q15.a: Yes. Our Territory Optimization add-on function helps you automatically optimize your sales territories.

q16.q: Can I buy a perpetual S-Locator license?
q16.a: No – S-Locator is a 'software as a service' application. You subscribe as a service and save yourself costs for server hardware and maintenance.

q17.a: S-Locator uses the most advanced security standards: SSL encrypted, firewalls, encrypted disks, biometric access control data centers.

q18.a: Yes – S-Locator is compliant with GDPR.

q19.q: Is the route planner S-Locator available 24/7?
q19.a: S-Locator is designed for high availability: Multiple redundant high performance servers with automatic load balancing.

q20.q: Where is the login? How do I get my access link?
q20.a: If you have an account, use the login button in the top right corner. Or receive your access link from your administrator.

q21.q: Is S-Locator the best route planning software for me?
q21.a: S-Locator is the best route planning software for you, if you are visiting your customers on a regular basis and spending most of your week on the road.

hero.title: Innovative territory optimization for your field sales force
hero.subtitle: The future of sales force optimization is dynamic
hero.desc: User friendly, powerful in the implementation, impressive results. Convince yourself today of S-Locator Territory Optimization.

useCases.title: Use cases of dynamic territory optimization
useCases.faqQ: What is territory optimization in field sales?
useCases.faqA: Territory optimization in field sales refers to the process of revising and adjusting existing sales territories based on predefined parameters. The aim is to avoid overloading or underutilizing the field sales team, which can lead to improved customer satisfaction and a significant reduction in driving times.

content.t1: At the touch of a button, you can distribute the customers of the departing employee to the territories of the other employees.
content.t2: Employee A would like to work 20 instead of 30 hours per week in the future: You decide as a team and with S-Locator where routes can be reduced and which employee can take up customers.
content.t3: You cushion parental leave, longer vacation or absences due to illness in the remaining team in the best possible way and share customers fairly.
content.t4: How should our customers be distributed across the team so that all A-customers are visited at least once in the 4th quarter? Visualize your planning ideas in no time at all.
content.t5: Integrate your new customers efficiently and optimize your territories in a matter of seconds when your existing customers' priorities shift.
content.t6: Are you planning to enter a new market and need to expand your field sales team? S-Locator automatically determines the number and suitable home locations for new employees.

switcher.mainTitle: That’s how easy territory optimization is with S-Locator
switcher.mainDesc: You start with your current initial situation and S-Locator guides you step by step and in a few moments to an optimization result.

s1.title: Your initial situation
s1.desc: Visualize the customers of your field reps on the map and view all relevant information in the detailed view.

s2.title: Your optimization settings
s2.desc: In the next steps, you can optionally carry out manual adjustments or optimization settings per field rep.

s3.title: Your optimization result
s3.desc: In just a few moments S-Locator Territory Optimization calculates your optimization result. Visualize it on the map, in the detailed view.

s4.title: 7 prioritization levels
s4.desc: With the help of several prioritization levels, you can choose between the lowest total travel time or a balanced workload.

saas.title: Test different scenarios in a matter of seconds
saas.b2: on any device with a web browser
saas.p1: With the SaaS power of S-Locator you can test different scenarios within seconds - without installation and without updates. This allows you to easily share your optimization suggestions with your team.
saas.p2: In the results, we point out how much different areas deteriorate or improve. Keep in mind that even supposedly small optimization potentials of 1-2% have an enormous impact on your sales success.
saas.p3: With sales force costs of around $10 million per year a 1% improvement thanks to S-Locator Territory Optimization can save you sales costs of as much as $100,000 per year.

hero.title: Opt for innovative territory optimization!
hero.subtitle: Conventional territory planning is a thing of the past. S-Locator Territory Optimization is the future.

i1.bad: manual, slow and/or only postcode accuracy
i1.good: automatic, fast and street number accuracy
i1.desc: Territory planning software needs to know exactly where your customers are located on the map. This is the only way to ensure precise planning. The inaccuracy of postcode-based tools can easily add up to 15 minutes of extra travel time per customer. S-Locator automatically converts addresses into geo-coordinates without incurring additional costs.

i2.bad: As the crow flies, estimated travel time
i2.desc: The actual road network has a big influence on travel times to customers. Using straight-line distances instead of the actual road network makes calculation results error-prone. S-Locator always uses real routes, taking account of historical driving speeds on each road section.

i3.desc: Customer visit intervals have a big impact on travel time in the field. If you visit a customer weekly instead of monthly, all that time spent in the car really adds up. S-Locator factors these in to group compatible intervals together.

i4.desc: Customers with heavily restricted business hours (like doctors’ surgeries for example) have an impact on travel times. S-Locator handles these efficiently.

i5.desc: Call duration has a major impact on the number of customer visits you can make each day. S-Locator takes the call duration of each individual customer into account.

i6.desc: The shorter the daily working hours, the more negative the impact of customers who are based further away. When optimizing your territory, S-Locator takes the working hours of each individual weekday into account.

i7.desc: When it comes to geographically large areas, overnight stays can have a huge influence on total travel time. S-Locator lets you make various settings for each field rep’s overnight stays.

i8.desc: Field reps make their customer calls by completing personal daily routes. S-Locator factors everything in, with accurate geocoding, real routes, call intervals, business hours, and overnight stays by simulating daily routes.

i9.desc: During customer calls, there’s no guarantee that the contact person will actually meet your field rep. With S-Locator, you can configure the contact rate and apply it to the simulated daily tours.

i10.desc: Every year, the road network changes by up to 15%. At S-Locator, we update road maps (including speed data) quarterly. You don’t need to do a thing.

i1.desc: Local installation usually means you’re dependent on your IT department for resources. S-Locator requires no installation – all you need is a web browser.

i2.desc: Conventional territory planning applications are Windows programs. You can access S-Locator and all its features from any device with a modern web browser.

i3.desc: Territory optimization requires a lot of computing power. At S-Locator, we only use cutting-edge, high-performance servers with 50 times the computing power of an office PC.

i4.desc: Installing conventional territory planning software locally eats up space. With S-Locator, the data is stored centrally on the SaaS servers.

i5.good: automatic, so no update work required
i5.desc: Like the initial installation, conventional software updates involve manual work. At S-Locator, our SaaS servers are updated automatically and transparently.

i1.desc: Traditional software usually focuses on visualizing various geographical data. S-Locator is fully dedicated to sales territory optimization, making it intuitive.

i2.bad: A multitude of buttons, icons and menus
i2.desc: Conventional territory planning software often has a complex structure. S-Locator takes the form of an intuitive wizard that only displays the features required for each step.

i3.desc: We consciously made S-Locator very easy to learn, so that anyone responsible for field sales can profit from territory analysis.

i4.desc: Many conventional solutions abort calculations with an unhelpful general error message. S-Locator tries to find the most effective solutions based on the settings.

i5.desc: With conventional planning software, it’s often necessary to resort to printouts. A few clicks is all it takes to share results with other users in S-Locator.

i1.desc: Field reps’ time is expensive. S-Locator’s optimization is based on route simulation using actual routes, making the optimization as realistic as possible.

i2.desc: Too much leads to unrealistic expectations; too little wastes human resources. S-Locator calculates workload as realistically as possible using 7 different proposals.

i3.feature: Increasing the number of customer calls
i3.desc: More frequent visits normally boost turnover. Each customer visit you gain through better optimization will ultimately translate into higher turnover.

i1.desc: Example: S-Locator usually takes about 30 seconds to import and automatically geocode 20,000 new addresses – even if they contain typos.

i2.desc: Example: S-Locator usually takes about 1 minute to complete a travel time analysis for 50 territories with 20,000 customers.

i3.desc: Example: S-Locator generally takes just 1–5 minutes to optimize 50 territories with 20,000 customers.

i1.desc: The S-Locator territory planning wizard has built-in templates for scenarios. You create temporary change instructions that you can track, edit and undo with a single click.

i2.desc: With S-Locator, you have a direct before/after comparison for every parameter in every territory.

i1.desc: S-Locator territory optimization is designed for more frequent use. We call this “dynamic territory optimization”.

i2.good: Field sales management and regional managers
i2.desc: Everyone with responsibility for field sales can leverage territory optimization and analysis at any time.

i1.desc: At S-Locator, both our data centre and every department in the company are ISO27001 certified.

i2.desc: With S-Locator, no data is transferred to third parties, as the software is operated on our servers.

i3.desc: At S-Locator, all our servers are located in the EU. This is the only place where we process data.

i4.desc: At S-Locator, data processing is GDPR-compliant. We’re happy to provide you with an order processing contract.

i1.good: yes, with over 15 years of experience
i1.desc: With S-Locator, you get both from a single source. With over 15 years of experience, you’re in safe hands.

i2.feature: Apps for territory and route planning
i2.good: both in one app and database
i2.desc: With S-Locator, territory and route planning are integrated in one and the same application.

resultsCta.title: Optimization results in minutes.
resultsCta.desc: That’s how easy territory optimization is with S-Locator Territory Optimization

items.q1: What are the benefits of territory optimization and route planning from a single source?
items.a1: In many cases, conventional providers only offer one or the other, so you then need two different applications. S-Locator Territory Optimization + Route Planner combines the power of the best route-planning solution with next-generation dynamic territory optimization.
items.q2: Unlike conventional territory planning, S-Locator Territory Optimization accommodates multiple planners. Where is the advantage in that?
items.a2: With S-Locator, the outdated idea that only one person can do territory planning is a thing of the past. Our solution lets individual regional managers optimize their own territories – a big plus when they need to react quickly.
items.q3: Why do common territory optimization methods like straight-line distances and cluster analyses pose costly drawbacks?
items.a3: Unrealistic assumptions: territory optimization using straight-line distances produces inefficient routes, because they ignore real-world factors such as traffic conditions.
items.q4: Why does a territory optimization solution have to be dynamic?
items.a4: S-Locator Territory Optimization gives you the power of SaaS, which comes with big advantages: you can forget about installation, updates, and having to rely on your IT department.
items.q5: Does territory optimization force me to reallocate my sales territories?
items.a5: Under the old, static approach, that was certainly the case. But S-Locator lets you analyse parameters and opt to reduce the call interval if you can’t or don’t want to assign the customer to another field rep.

hero.title: FAQs on S-Locator Territory Optimization
hero.subtitle: Find the answer to your question

general.title: General
general.q1: What are the benefits of territory optimization and route planning from a single source?
general.a1:
In many cases, conventional providers only offer one or the other, so you then need two different applications and suppliers. This has major drawbacks: the sales team has to learn two different applications, and having to constantly transfer data between them is highly frustrating and inefficient.

With S-Locator Territory Optimization + Route Planner, you will experience a level of field sales efficiency you never thought possible.
general.q2: Can I use S-Locator for territory planning?
general.a2: Yes, S-Locator Territory Optimization supports you in automatically planning and optimizing your sales territories. This not only saves you extra mileage and travel costs, but also ensures a balanced workload for your sales team.
general.q3: Unlike conventional territory planning, S-Locator accommodates multiple planners. Where is the advantage in that?
general.a3: With S-Locator, the outdated idea that only one person can do territory planning is a thing of the past. Our solution lets individual regional managers optimize their own territories – a big plus when they need to react quickly to unforeseeable situations.
general.q4: Why do common methods like straight-line distances and cluster analyses pose costly drawbacks?
general.a4: Territory optimization based on these approaches is simple in theory, but fails in practice due to unrealistic assumptions (ignoring traffic/topography) and overlooking individual customer needs.

industries.title: Industries
industries.q1: For which use cases is S-Locator Territory Optimization suitable?
industries.a1: S-Locator Territory Optimization is used to optimize schedules and adapt sales territories. The product is suitable for field sales teams who want to organize their territories more efficiently, reduce driving times and distribute customers evenly.
industries.q2: For which industries is S-Locator Territory Optimization suitable?
industries.a2: Objectively speaking, territory optimization is essential for any company with an active field sales force, including pharmaceutical, consumer goods, automotive, and more.

security.title: Information Security
security.a1: S-Locator uses the most advanced security standards: communication is SSL encrypted, access requires authentication, and data is stored on encrypted disks on protected servers.
security.a2: Yes – S-Locator is compliant with GDPR. We ensure the highest standards of data protection.

access.title: Access
access.a1: S-Locator is designed for high availability: Multiple redundant high performance servers with automatic load balancing and failsafes.
access.q2: Where is the login? How do I get my login details?
access.a2: If you have a purchased account or an active trial, you will receive your personal access link via email. Your access link works on PCs, smartphones and tablets.

test.q1: How do I get help and support for S-Locator?
test.a1: Our support team is happy to help you via email. Within the application, you will find online help and tutorial videos.
test.q2: I'd like to get a demonstration of S-Locator Territory Optimization.
test.a2: We are happy to prepare an online presentation for your management and sales team. Contact us today to arrange a demo.
test.q3: Is S-Locator the best territory planning software for me?
test.a3: S-Locator is the best software for you if you want to regularly adjust or plan new sales territories while ensuring efficiency, fairness, and reduced sales costs.

purchase.q1: Can I buy a perpetual S-Locator license?

hero.title: Integrations
hero.subtitle: S-Locator within your system landscape
hero.desc: The S-Locator route planning app offers manual data import and can also be connected to your CRM/ERP. S-Locator makes it easy for you to use the necessary data for your route planning.

manual.title: Manual import (Excel/CSV)
items: All you need for route optimization is an Excel, CSV or ODS file with your customer data.
Use our sample table including instructions for the import.
Read our article about data preparation for automatic route planning and learn how to optimally prepare your data for import into S-Locator.
This 5-minute video tutorial shows you every step: create test account, import customers, calculate first route.

salesforce.title: S-Locator Salesforce Connector
items: Import accounts, appointments, users to S-Locator. Optionally, contacts or leads can also be imported.
Plan optimized routes to your existing Salesforce customers and appointments.
Export call reports automatically to Salesforce.
The S-Locator Salesforce Connector is installed within our SaaS server infrastructure and connects to the S-Locator SaaS server via the API.
The S-Locator Connector App is installed within Salesforce. This primarily supports the authorization process (OAuth) for the connector.
salesforce.btn: Learn more about S-Locator Salesforce Connector

dynamics.title: Dynamics CRM Sales
items: Integrate the S-Locator route planning solution into your on-premise or cloud versions of Microsoft Dynamics CRM (from 2016, 365)
Your existing companies, contacts, leads and appointments are synchronized with S-Locator, changes and call reports are transferred to Dynamics.
Field reps plan their routes and document their visits in the S-Locator web application on any device.
S-Locator is integrated into Dynamics CRM Sales as a managed solution with just a few clicks by your admin.
Are you a system integrator for Microsoft Dynamics CRM? Let's talk!
dynamics.btn: Learn more about S-Locator for Dynamics

veeva.title: Veeva CRM
items: S-Locator Veeva CRM Connector is an off-the-shelf software which is installed as a managed solution in your Veeva CRM Organization.
Accounts, Office Best Times, cycle plans and saved appointments are taken into account by S-Locator when calculating an optimized schedule.
Pharmaceutical sales representatives use S-Locator's optimized schedule in Veeva CRM Mobile to visit more customers with less mileage.
You benefit from the AI-supported S-Locator-calendar, which helps you to adhere to cycle plans and keep track of all your customers.

other.title: Other CRM/ERP systems
items: No matter which CRM/ERP system you use - if it can export and import Excel or CSV files, then you can synchronize your customers, appointments, reports, tasks and users with S-Locator.
For regular automated import and export of your data, all you need to do is configure our API PowerShell scripts for data exchange.
After successfully completing the Setup Workshop, we will be happy to help you integrate S-Locator into your IT landscape.
The API connection is included in every company account and is available from two field service licenses.

api.title: S-Locator API
items: S-Locator has an HTTPS API for automated data import and export.
The calls are made directly from the development environment of your CRM/ERP system or your programming language.
Find the documentation in our API Manual and get answers to your questions and hands-on training by our API support team.
The API connection is included in every company account and is available from two field service licenses.
api.btn: Find out more about the S-Locator API

isv.title: S-Locator ISV API
items: Do you have or are you developing an app for field sales force in sales, marketing or service?
Then integrate the intelligence of S-Locator directly into your app - with our RESTful JSON API.
Offer your customers a new, innovative feature with S-Locator and open up a new source of income.
Expand your field service app with route planning and dynamic scheduling.

blogPost1.title: Successful sales reporting in the field with S-Locator®

content.p1: In field sales, customer contact is not the only factor that determines success. Meaningful sales reporting is just as important, because systematically recording and evaluating your activities, results, and potential allows you to manage sales processes in a targeted manner, make optimal use of resources, and make better decisions.
content.p2: Unfortunately, reporting often fails in practice due to a lack of transparency, time-consuming recording methods, and scattered data sources. In this article, we show you how modern sales reporting works and how S-Locator® supports the field sales force in this process.
content.h2_1: Why sales reporting is so crucial in field sales
content.p3: Professional sales reporting provides insight into the performance of teams, individual employees, and entire regions within your sales territory at the touch of a button. A well-managed reporting system answers questions such as:
content.l1_1: Which customers were visited and when?
content.l1_2: What deals and sales were achieved?
content.p4: Without structured sales reporting, this transparency is lacking. This often leads to inaccurate forecasting, inefficient use of resources, and missed opportunities. Field staff, on the other hand, need a reporting tool that doesn't slow them down but supports them, and that is fast, mobile, and automated.
content.h2_2: What are typical challenges in sales reporting?
content.p5: Sales reporting is often an unpopular duty, especially in the field. The reasons for this are:
content.l2_1_desc: Call reports are manually transferred to a CRM system after appointments. This work takes time and motivation.
content.l2_2_desc: Data is scattered across Excel spreadsheets, notes, or various tools. There is no overall picture or complete solution.
content.l2_3_desc: Decisions are based on outdated figures.
content.l2_4_desc: Data is collected but not translated into meaningful key figures.
content.h2_3: How does sales reporting with S-Locator® reduce the workload?
content.p6: S-Locator® is much more than just intelligent route planning. The route planning software provides field teams with integrated sales reporting that takes place on the mobile device immediately after each customer visit.
content.p7: The most important advantages at a glance:
content.l3_1_desc: Every customer interaction is documented in full immediately after the sales appointment.
content.l3_2_desc: S-Locator® prepares data in such a way that managers can immediately identify trends.
content.l3_3_desc: S-Locator® integrates seamlessly with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, and other systems.
content.l3_4_desc: Sales management and field staff have up-to-date figures at their fingertips at all times.
content.h2_4: Practical example: Transparency and efficiency in one step
content.p8: A medium-sized pharmaceutical company uses S-Locator® for the automatic route planning of its 30 sales representatives. Previously, visit reports were maintained in Excel and only evaluated at the end of the month, which meant a lot of manual work with outdated data. Today, field staff use S-Locator® to log every appointment immediately.
content.p9: Sales reporting in the field doesn't have to be complicated. By focusing on automation, integration, and user-friendly evaluations, you can save time and gain valuable insights. S-Locator® takes most of the administrative work off your team's hands and delivers reporting that managers love.
